## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build --workspace` succeeds
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` and `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` are clean
- [ ] `docxcore` stays dependency-free (no new runtime crates in the core)
- [ ] Behavior change is described above (and documented if user-facing)
